summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite wiring, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db:prepare, an idempotent protected default endpoint seed, repeatability unit coverage, and docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape. The implementation stays scoped to endpoint persistence and maps to endpoint-tool-management.md. I could not rerun write-producing commands in the read-only sandbox, but the provided deterministic check summary shows all required gates passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired through scripts/db-prepare.mjs to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run endpoint seed defaults.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite DB and verifies singular seed rows.

prisma/schema.prisma can represent endpoint names, title/description, enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Prisma models, runtime preparation behavior, and seed defaults.
Required gates are recorded as passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
